title: Kaleidoscope Orchard
description: Added a series of fruit products such as fruit, fruit cakes, and fruit wine.
body:
- Multiple new crops: Strawberry, Orange, Kiwi, Blueberry.
- Fruit cakes & fruit wines.
- Chocolate!!!
- Unique fruit planting method — fruit trees require water and soil around their roots (remember to loosen the soil often).
- More content coming soon!

- 多种新作物：草莓、橙子、猕猴桃、蓝莓。
- 水果蛋糕与水果酒。
- 巧克力！！！
- 独特的水果种植方法
- 需要在树根周围放水和土的果树（记得多松土）
- 以后还有更多内容！
